LanguageData.ABY_AshenVambraces.label: ashen vambraces
LanguageData.ABY_AshenVambraces.description: Early abyssal forearm braces made from dark steel plates, residue-lined hinge bands and crude ember conduits. They are not gloves; they reinforce the forearms so the wearer can keep tools, weapons and ritual implements steady near active forge machinery.
LanguageData.ABY_RiftVectorVambraces.label: rift vector vambraces
LanguageData.ABY_RiftVectorVambraces.description: Mid-tier forearm modules that stabilize recoil, tool pressure and melee commitment through paired rift-vector conduits. Violet-red channels across the plates make every movement feel corrected by something just outside normal geometry.
LanguageData.ABY_CrownAuthorityVambraces.label: crown authority vambraces
LanguageData.ABY_CrownAuthorityVambraces.description: Late-line crown-authority vambraces built around a compact command lattice. They do not simply protect the forearms; they translate grip, recoil and striking vectors into tiny authorized acts of dominion.
